macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin falls below $74,000 as crypto market weakens
items.summary: Bitcoin traded around $73,252, down 0.3% over 24 hours, after failing to hold a breakout above roughly $82,000 and hitting a six-week low. Ether also slipped to about $2,008, while XRP and Solana were both modestly lower.

items.title: FalconX files confidential U.S. IPO as institutional crypto infrastructure expands
items.summary: FalconX submitted a confidential filing for a U.S. initial public offering, marking another sign of crypto firms moving toward public markets. The same market recap highlighted ongoing institutional and infrastructure developments, including stablecoin and tokenization activity.

items.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin supply surges more than 500% month over month
items.summary: Tether's USAT stablecoin supply rose to $140.8 million at the end of April, up 540% from $22 million at the end of March, according to a Deloitte reserve report cited in the market recap. The growth underscores accelerating demand for U.S.-linked stablecoin products.

items.title: Paxos secures regulatory progress for trust bank conversion
items.summary: Paxos received a regulatory win after previously getting conditional approval to convert into an OCC national trust bank, following a prior technical error involving a massive PYUSD mint-and-burn incident in 2025. The development reflects continued U.S. regulatory movement for crypto infrastructure firms.

items.title: SoFi launches bank-issued stablecoin inside its consumer app
items.summary: SoFi rolled out SoFiUSD to its 14.7 million members, becoming the first U.S. national bank to embed a bank-issued stablecoin directly in a consumer banking app. The launch reportedly lifted SoFi shares more than 7% at the open on Friday.

items.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE hits a new all-time high above $73
items.summary: CryptoPotato reported that HYPE surged to a new all-time high above $73 even as Bitcoin weakened below the $73,000 area. The move made Hyperliquid one of the day's strongest notable project performers.

items.title: XRP Ledger activity rises despite XRP price weakness
items.summary: CryptoPotato highlighted Messari data showing XRP price fell 27% in Q1 2026 even as XRP Ledger transactions and stablecoin adoption increased. The report points to stronger network usage even during a price slump.
